title: ⚔️ Symbolic Weapon Systems
name: Symbolic Weapon Systems
what_it_is: Weapons made of meaning—not steel or light, but metaphor, symbol, belief. A sword of betrayal, a gun that fires guilt.
how_to_use: her weapon is a heartbreak blade—each strike reopens psychic wounds
he fires the glyph of exile—banishes you with symbolic code
animation_behavior: Weapon effects reflect inner conflict, visuals tied to emotion or intent, symbolic resonance trails ---
